zh.lifeSummary: 當Pétronille DE JOIGNY於1230年出生在法國布格喬尼時，她的父親Gaucher I de JOIGNY69歲，母親Amicie de Montfort31歲。她於1249年6月與Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches在法國布格-福朗-可特艾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1289年享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pétronille DE JOIGNY于1230年出生在法国布格喬尼时，她的父亲Gaucher I de JOIGNY69岁，母亲Amicie de Montfort31岁。她于1249年6月与Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches在法国布格-福朗-可特艾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1289年享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pétronille
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

en.lifeSummary: When Pétronille DE JOIGNY was born in 1230, in Joigny, Yonne, Burgundy, France, her father, Gaucher I de JOIGNY, was 69 and her mother, Amicie de Montfort, was 31. She married Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches in June 1249, in Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1289, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pétronille DE JOIGNY est née en 1230, à Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, son père, Gaucher I de JOIGNY, avait 69 ans et sa mère, Amicie de Montfort, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches en juin 1249, à Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1289, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pétronille DE JOIGNY 1230 in Joigny, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gaucher I de JOIGNY 69 und ihre Mutter Amicie de Montfort 31. Sie hat im Juni 1249 in Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1289 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pétronille DE JOIGNY è nata il nel 1230 nel Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Gaucher I de JOIGNY, aveva 69 anni e sua madre, Amicie de Montfort, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches nel giugno 1249, nel Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1289, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pétronille DE JOIGNYが1230年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンジョイグニーで生まれた時，父Gaucher I de JOIGNYは69歳，母Amicie de Montfortは31歳であった。1249年6月にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンでPeter of Courtenay Lord of Conchesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1289年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pétronille DE JOIGNY(이)가 1230년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 조익니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gaucher I de JOIGNY(은)는 69세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amicie de Montfort(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1249년 6월 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘에서 Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.ABT 1281/1282: de 8 de janeiro de 1281 a 7 de janeiro de 1283
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pétronille DE JOIGNY nasceu em 1230, em Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Gaucher I de JOIGNY, tinha 69 anos e sua mãe, Amicie de Montfort, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches em junho de 1249, em Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1289, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pétronille DE JOIGNY родилась в 1230 г. в местности джоигни, енн, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Gaucher I de JOIGNY было 69 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicie de Montfort, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches июнь 1249 г. в местности енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1289 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.ABT 1281/1282: mai le 8 Ianuari 1281 e o'o I le 7 Ianuari 1283

es.ABT 1281/1282: desde 8 de enero de 1281 hasta 7 de enero de 1283
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pétronille DE JOIGNY nació en 1230, en Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Gaucher I de JOIGNY, tenía 69 años y su mamá, Amicie de Montfort, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches en junio de 1249, en Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1289, a la edad de 59 años.
